songs.title: Breathe With the Light
songs.tags:
Suggested 432Hz Arrangement
Tempo: 72–78 BPM
Key: D Major or G Major
Chords: G – D – Em – C (verses & chorus)
Instruments: acoustic guitar, soft piano, warm bass, light percussion, subtle pads
Vocal style: relaxed, airy, and intimate with plenty of space between phrases.

songs.title: Tatay
songs.tags: Filipino reggae and island pop with warm offbeat guitar, relaxed skanking drums, buoyant bass, and a gentle surfy groove; intro opens with spoken dedication, verse rides close-mic Taglish storytelling, pre-chorus lifts with layered harmonies, chorus lands with group vocals and handclaps. Add steel-drum sparkle, conga fills, and soft delay throws. Bright, heartfelt, sunlit mix., light, strong, warm, heartfelt, world, reggae, pop, uplifting

songs.title: Nanay
songs.tags: Soft rock and adult contemporary with warm acoustic guitar, gentle piano, brushed drums, and rich three-part harmonies; verse stays intimate and story-driven, pre-chorus lifts with string swells and bass motion, chorus opens wide with stacked vocals and ringing piano, bridge blooms with soft strings then final chorus adds fuller harmonies and a key-change feel. Close-mic lead vocal, tender doubles on the hook, airy backing oohs, subtle cymbal shimmers, and a bright, nostalgic mix., world, psychedelic rock, soul, vocal, rock, rich, gentle, nostalgic, r&b, disco, pop, light, classic, warm, acoustic, soft, contemporary, uplifting, soft rock

songs.title: Forever Starts Today
songs.tags: Warm acoustic wedding ballad at 74 BPM in 4/4 time, featuring intimate male lead vocal with light harmony stacks on the choruses, fingerpicked and gently strummed acoustic guitars, soft piano voicings, and lush but subtle string pads that swell into each hook. Production emphasizes organic room ambience, close-miked vocal presence, and a relaxed, romantic groove with brushed percussion entering later to lift the final sing-along chorus. Overall tone is heartfelt, hopeful, and celebratory, tailored for proposals, first dances, and anniversary moments.

songs.title: Forever Starts Today
songs.tags: Warm, romantic acoustic wedding ballad at 74 BPM in 4/4 time, featuring intimate male lead vocals supported by fingerpicked acoustic guitar, gentle piano voicings, and soft string layers that bloom in the choruses. The production is organic and cozy with light room reverb, stacked harmonies on the hooks, and a sing-along final chorus that gradually swells with additional backing vocals and subtle percussion, creating an emotional, celebratory first-dance atmosphere.

The production is organic and cozy with light room reverb, stacked harmonies on the hooks, and a sing-along final chorus that gradually swells with additional backing vocals and subtle percussion, creating an emotional, celebratory first-dance atmosphere.

songs.title: Above the Skyline
songs.tags: Uplifting acoustic-pop anthem driven by bright strummed acoustic guitars, warm male baritone lead with light head-voice lifts, and a steady 4/4 groove around 105 BPM. The arrangement adds light drums with kick on the downbeats, crisp snare, tambourine and hand claps on the backbeat, and supportive electric bass. The chorus leans into a big sing-along feel with stacked harmonies and catchy hooks, while verses stay more intimate and story-driven. Overall the production is polished and radio-friendly, with a feel-good, nostalgic energy and shimmering acoustic textures.

songs.title: Rewind You
songs.tags: Emotional indie acoustic rock ballad with warm male lead vocal, intimate fingerpicked acoustic guitar, ambient electric guitar swells, soft piano, and supportive warm bass. Light brushed percussion adds gentle movement while cinematic strings bloom in the second chorus. The tempo sits at a steady 78 BPM in 4/4, with an overall E minor emotional color over a G major palette, creating a nostalgic, bittersweet yet hopeful mood. The production is spacious and radio-ready, with a heartfelt, confessional delivery and an emotional guitar-led bridge that lifts the final chorus.
